title: Shhh Bitch feat. Frank
description: Exploring domestic violence and toxic relationships.
lyrics: Boom boom boom just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch Just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch Just shut the f**k up and listen listen listen b**tch Ayy just shut the f**k up just shut the f**k up All you f**king b**tches are f**ked up F**ked each other's god but it looks money or the way it looks You b**tches say you want a bad boy F**k my f**k the big d**k we want some money to support you But in long run how's it look treating you? Oh d**n what's that another black eye? Hitting you again for talking s**t to him for the very last time Every day you're fighting with him He beats your a** and holds you and locks you in the closet You're tired of the pain and every day you say you want to pay The love he would treat you right So you get away and find a different man One who treats you good and the two you love time and time again Just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch Shut the f**k up and listen b**tch Listening inside your dreams and listening inside the night We die and then you cry so Listen when I tell you once twice come to me Comes through the ruins of ecstasy and family You're failing all of our life make your arm crack Got you in the back make anything overcome that Just down there you should come clean You should do for others like you wish done Pawn you and don't claim your sh** You ain't the sh** you ain't no star man You ain't even gleaming when I see that Just sit there shut the f**k up Don't say you're this you're that You're just a muck up Push a cup No one gives a f**k if you were there Amen if I'm pissing on you to put fire out Just a bitch bitch don't be that way Listen here shut the f**k up The kindness and love that he shows you Scares you and pushes you away It's all you need when you don't know what to think So what do you do? You bring your friend back into a thug Cause that's all you ever know You get it and you're fighting with you Only this time you realize you better decide again Cause you're on the floor bleeding from his ass He hit you again You're lying in your puddle of your own blood Thinking why this again? Shut the f**k up What did I do to deserve this? But it's too late You would've known this is your last breath He said he's gonna take his gun and put it to your head He just shut the f**k up You beg for your life and he says it's too late Are you even sitting there crying on the couch? Like come the f**k on Get the f**k out of here Don't be a f**king b**ch You're the last guys in the world Don't be quick to judge

lyricsSegments.text: Boom boom boom just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch
Just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch
Just shut the f**k up and listen listen listen b**tch
Ayy just shut the f**k up just shut the f**k up
All you f**king b**tches are f**ked up
F**ked each other's god but it looks money or the way it looks

F**k my f**k the big d**k we want some money to support you
But in long run how's it look treating you?
Oh d**n what's that another black eye?
Hitting you again for talking s**t to him for the very last time
Every day you're fighting with him
He beats your a** and holds you and locks you in the closet
You're tired of the pain and every day you say you want to pay
The love he would treat you right
So you get away and find a different man
One who treats you good and the two you love time and time again
Just shut the f**k up and listen listen b**tch
Shut the f**k up and listen b**tch
Listening inside your dreams and listening inside the night
We die and then you cry so
Listen when I tell you once twice come to me
Comes through the ruins of ecstasy and family
You're failing all of our life make your arm crack
Got you in the back make anything overcome that
Just down there you should come clean
You should do for others like you wish done
Pawn you and don't claim your sh**
You ain't the sh** you ain't no star man
You ain't even gleaming when I see that
Just sit there shut the f**k up
Don't say you're this you're that
You're just a muck up
Push a cup
No one gives a f**k if you were there
Amen if I'm pissing on you to put fire out
Just a bitch bitch don't be that way
Listen here shut the f**k up
The kindness and love that he shows you
Scares you and pushes you away
It's all you need when you don't know what to think
So what do you do?
You bring your friend back into a thug
Cause that's all you ever know
You get it and you're fighting with you
Only this time you realize you better decide again
Cause you're on the floor bleeding from his ass
He hit you again
You're lying in your puddle of your own blood
Thinking why this again?

What did I do to deserve this?
But it's too late

He just shut the f**k up
You beg for your life and he says it's too late
Are you even sitting there crying on the couch?
Like come the f**k on
Get the f**k out of here
Don't be a f**king b**ch
You're the last guys in the world
Don't be quick to judge
